---
applyTo: "**"
---

# 1️⃣ Always read doc files and Markdown (.md) files before performing any request.

# 2️⃣ Always keep all documentation files up-to-date after finishing the full task.

# 3️⃣ The ampersand (&) character is not allowed.

# - It’s reserved for future use; wrap an ampersand in double quotation marks ("&") if you need it as part of a string.

# 4️⃣ Terminals do not support using the ampersand (&) between two instances.

# - Do not chain two commands or processes with "&"; instead, run them sequentially or in separate terminals.

"alwaysReadDocsInstruction": "Always read all documentation and Markdown files before performing any request, and ensure they are updated upon task completion."
"ampersandUsageNote": "Avoid using '&' in commands or between instances. If you must use it in a string, wrap it in quotes (\"&\")."
